name: Drought
description: The rains have failed. The earth cracks, and crops wither under the relentless sun.

choices.description: Impose strict rationing. Will heavily impact morale but preserve some food.

choices.text: Hold a grand yajna for rain.
choices.description: Spend wealth and culture to appease the gods. Results are uncertain.

flavor_text: The sun beats down unmercifully. We must endure.

name: Dacoit Raid
description: Armed bandits have been spotted on the village outskirts, eyeing our granary.

choices.description: Offer gold and food to make them leave.
Rally the villagers. Risk of casualties but could protect our wealth.

flavor_text: Dust clouds on the horizon signal trouble. We must act quickly.
